subcodes.title: Closing prayer of weekly meeting, spoken on 1913-02-14
subcodes.first_line: I beg of Thee, O my God! My Lord! My Hope! And my utmost Desire! Verily Thou knowest my humility, my contrition, my poverty, my indigence, my agitation
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
